title: EV startup VOICE raises seed funding round | Medial
full_text: Title: EV startup VOICE raises seed funding round | Medial ## EV startup VOICE raises seed funding round. EV startup VOICE raises seed funding round/entrackr/media/media_files/2024/12/13/HBX7GoKqErnLij2eVzq1.png). Notable investments include Be Clinical’s seed round led by V3 Ventures, RoadGrid’s INR 12 crore for EV solutions, Flent’s $25 million for expanding its managed living services, and Arrowhead’s $3 million focusing on voice AI. The funding will enhance Sipfront's enterprise-focused voice AI solutions and automated quality assurance technologies. ## YC-backed Voice AI Startup Bolna Raises $6.3 Million Seed Round Led by General Catalyst. YC-backed Voice AI Startup Bolna Raises $6.3 Million Seed Round Led by General Catalyst. ### Bolna, a Bengaluru-based voice AI startup, raised $6.3 million in a seed round led by General Catalyst. ### Pune-based EV charging infrastructure startup NIKOL EV has raised an undisclosed amount in a pre-seed funding round led by EvolveX. ## Voice AI startup SuperBryn raises $1.2 million from Kalaari Capital, angels - The Economic Times. Voice AI startup SuperBryn raises $1.2 million from Kalaari Capital, angels - The Economic Times. ### Voice AI startup SuperBryn raised $1.2 million in a pre-seed round led by Kalaari Capital's CXXO initiative, supporting women founders. ## Voice AI startup Arrowhead raises $3 Mn in seed round led by Stellaris. Voice AI startup Arrowhead raises $3 Mn in seed round led by Stellaris. ### Bengaluru-based voice AI startup Arrowhead has raised $3 million in a seed funding round led by Stellaris Venture Partners. ### EV startup Voice has raised Rs 5 crore in seed funding, led by BizDateUp, to deploy 2,500 electric vehicles and expand in tier-II cities in India. ## Voice cloning startup Resemble AI Raises $8 million in Series A. Voice cloning startup Resemble AI Raises $8 million in Series A. ### Resemble AI, a voice cloning startup, has raised $8 million in a Series A funding round. The funding will support the expansion of Resemble AI's platform and the development of new features, further enhancing its capabilities in the voice cloning space. ### Ringg AI, a Bengaluru-based conversational AI startup, raised $1 million in seed funding from Capital 2B. Key funding highlights include WanderOn securing INR 54 Cr for experiential travel expansion and Bolna closing a $6.3 Mn seed round for its voice AI platform. / score=0.272 / query=AI agent startup raises seed Series A funding 2026 / intent=find_startups / path=capital_startup
